title: Built AI-powered analytics and reporting agents
description: Developed AI-powered analytics agents using OpenAI APIs to automate sales reporting, PPC bid analysis, keyword optimization, and operational performance monitoring across Amazon and Shopify channels.
business_problem: Manual reporting and PPC optimization workflows were time-intensive and difficult to scale across multiple marketplaces and inventory environments.

Improved speed and consistency of PPC optimization decisions

title: Drove bundle strategy using sales and profitability analytics
description: Used Python-based demand and profitability analysis to launch new bundled product configurations including 3-packs and 6-packs.
business_problem: Single-unit product mix limited revenue growth and average order value opportunities.
solution: Analyzed customer purchasing patterns, profitability metrics, and conversion behavior to identify opportunities for bundled offerings.
business_impact: 3-pack products grew to 75% of total revenue
Improved product mix and operational efficiency

title: Built multi-warehouse inventory forecasting platform

title: Scaled e-commerce revenue through analytics-driven optimization

title: Built RAG-based technical knowledge assistant for industrial motion products
description: Designed and built a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) knowledge assistant to answer technical product questions across THK catalogs, Thomson catalogs, RFQ documentation, and internal product guides.
business_problem: Sales and product teams spent significant time searching catalogs, validating technical information, and relying on expert knowledge for product equivalents and application guidance.
solution: Implemented a RAG workflow combining document ingestion, chunking, embeddings, vector search, citation-based responses, and structured answer generation.
business_impact: Centralized technical product knowledge across multiple documentation sources
Improved access to technical documentation for sales and product teams
Created reusable knowledge infrastructure for future AI-powered workflows

metrics.knowledge_sources: THK catalogs, Thomson catalogs, RFQ documentation, internal product guides

title: Designed evaluation framework for RAG-based technical assistant
description: Created an evaluation framework to measure the quality, reliability, and usefulness of AI-generated technical product answers.
business_problem: AI-generated technical recommendations require validation to ensure accuracy, reduce hallucination risk, and build user trust.
solution: Defined evaluation criteria for retrieval accuracy, citation accuracy, answer correctness, hallucination risk, and human approval of recommendations.
business_impact: Established measurable quality standards for AI-generated technical answers
Created a repeatable evaluation approach for future AI products
Defined quality controls to support trust in AI-assisted workflows

title: Designed AI-assisted interchange workflow for competitor-to-THK product matching
description: Designed an AI-assisted workflow to help sales and product teams identify THK equivalents for competitor linear motion part numbers using technical documentation and reusable mapping logic.
business_problem: Competitor product interchange analysis depends heavily on expert review and repeated manual comparison of technical datasheets.
solution: Designed a workflow that identifies competitor family, type, and size attributes, retrieves relevant technical documentation, and recommends THK equivalents with supporting rationale.
business_impact: Designed a reusable workflow for technical product interchange analysis
Reduced expected dependency on senior product manager involvement
Created reusable mapping knowledge that improves with each validated interchange
